repo.name: canon-megatank-reset
repo.description: Native, key-free, cloud-free Canon MegaTank 5B00 waste-ink/ink-absorber counter reset and maintenance-protocol reverse engineering. Role: device-maintenance-tool / protocol-re-and-native-tool (mapped to the schema's org-utility primary_role; see taxonomy note).

sbom.notes: This repository publishes a native device-maintenance tool, reverse-engineering evidence, and an academic paper rather than a deployed application artifact. SBOM publication can move to recipe-available via ci-templates if the native tool is ever packaged for fleet release.
